git.note: commit = the branch tip that owns forces_t2a_newconv.csv; dirty flag reflects the local analysis working tree, not the CFD image (which is the pinned digest below)

timing.note: coarse RunAI cluster run, 2000 steps (~minutes wall)

outputs.note: new-convention plotfiles on the Z: drive (MOSQUITO_CFD_PLOTFILE_ROOT, run dir t2a-clean); not committed

convention: van Veen (span y, stroke Rz(phi) about vertical z; R=Rz(phi)Ry(alpha)Rx(theta))

body_frame_result.note: total force (ours) vs translational-only (van Veen). normal~match via AM/Wagner cancellation (cf_normal_match=True). chord ~3x target -> cf_chord_match=False (gap 0.62 > tol 0.6); the rotational-drag+tangential-AM explanation is an UNVERIFIED hypothesis (coarse grid, single-wingbeat transient, total-vs-translational unseparated), decomposition tracked in issue #40

analysis_host.note: metadata assembled on the local analysis box (NOT the CFD run node)

run_platform: Salk RunAI cluster GPU (talmo-lab project); exact node/GPU model not captured by the local analysis
